title: lobelia recurvifolia
intro: Lobelia recurvifolia, also known as Lobelia or Indian tobacco, is a flowering plant native to the Himalayan region. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Lobelia recurvifolia include its ability to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, as well as its use in treating anxiety, insomnia, and other nervous system disorders. Lobelia is traditionally prepared as a tea or tincture, and has also been used in herbal smoking blends for its purported medicinal effects.
